channel.title: SevenAtSevenSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump's EPA plans to end a key climate pollution regulation
item.description: The Environmental Protection Agency is eliminating a Clean Air Act finding from 2009 that is the basis for much of the federal government's actions to...

item.title: Pam Bondi to face questions from House lawmakers about her helm of the DOJ
item.description: The attorney general's appearance before the House Judiciary Committee comes one year into her tenure, a period marked by a striking departure from tr...

item.title: Shootings at school and home in British Columbia, Canada, leave 10 dead
item.description: A shooting at a school in British Columbia left seven people dead, while two more were found dead at a nearby home, authorities said. A woman who poli...

item.title: Person detained in Nancy Guthrie case is released. And, Bondi testifies before House
item.description: Police have released a person taken in for questioning in connection with Nancy Guthrie's disappearance. And, AG Pam Bondi will testify before the Hou...

item.title: From gifting a hat to tossing them onto the rink, a history of hat tricks in sports
item.description: Hat tricks have a rich history in hockey, but it didn't start there. For NPR's Word of the Week, we trace the term's some 150-year-history and why it'...

item.title: OpenAI policy exec who opposed chatbot’s “adult mode” reportedly fired on discrimination claim
item.description: The executive has denied the allegation that she engaged in discrimination.

item.title: Investigators searching a location in Arizona in disappearance of Nancy Guthrie
item.description: Officials say a person has been detained for questioning in the disappearance of Nancy Guthrie. The Pima County Sheriff’s Department said in a stateme...

item.title: 3 Reasons Why You Haven’t Bought Your First Rental Property (Yet)
item.description: If you’re like most rookies, you probably won’t buy a rental property in 2026. After all, there are too many things working against you: high mortgage...

item.title: Okay, now exactly half of xAI’s founding team has left the company
item.description: Whatever the cause of the departures, the cumulative impact is alarming. There is a lot of work left to do at xAI, and an IPO will bring more scrutiny...

item.title: Samsung to hold its Galaxy S26 event on February 25
item.description: Samsung is going to launch S26 lineup just before Mobile World Congress (MWC).

item.title: FAA closes airspace around El Paso, Texas, for 10 days, grounding all flights
With co-founders leaving and an IPO looming, Elon Musk turns talk to the moon
item.description: According to The New York Times, which reports that it heard the meeting, Musk told employees that xAI needs a lunar manufacturing facility, a factory...

item.title: The 2026 Value-Add Real Estate Playbook (30% – 50% ROIs)
item.description: What if you could create home equity and cash flow out of nothing? It’s not magic. We’ve done it hundreds of times, and most real estate investors sti...

item.title: 6 Ways I’ve Diversified My Passive Portfolio in Search of “Perfection”
item.description: Every time I’ve tried to get “clever” and pick “the next hot investment,” life crammed some humble pie down my throat. I don’t do that anymore. In my ...

item.title: 2026’s Top Growing Cities (People Are Moving Here!)
item.description: The “lock-in effect” is finally starting to break, and Americans are moving yet again. But, where are they going? The top cities people are moving to ...

item.title: Bank-Owned Homes Grew Rapidly at the End of 2025—Are We in a New Era of Distress?
item.description: When foreclosure activity reaches the REO stage, it represents the outcome of financial distress. The homeowner is no longer in the picture, the aucti...

item.title: FBI search of Georgia election offices relied on years-old claims of fraud, affidavit shows
Amazon may launch a marketplace where media sites can sell their content to AI companies
item.description: A new report claims the e-commerce giant is looking to create a pipeline of licensable content between media publishers and AI companies.
